review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools "" --output-format json < staged diff prompt > /tmp/cp00-101-claude-review-output-valid.json

findings.description: base_document_fixture intentionally stops at RP01.P05.M08 while CP00-102 begins the remaining RP01.P05.M09.S04 document fixture work; documented to prevent accidental normalization.
Pre-existing untracked handoff file is stale relative to CP00-101. It is outside the CP00-101 changeset and preserved per dirty/untracked work policy.

original_review_findings.description: UI fixture state used the default CP00-100 permission/audit binding IDs while deriving denied/review badge effects from CP00-101 state.
base_document_fixture omits RP01.P05.M09 while sibling base fixtures include it.
Non-base catalog items attributed the full 8-id golden-case set via covered_case_ids.
Pre-existing untracked new-session-handoff.md is stale relative to this pack.

notes: P3-1 and P3-3 were fixed after the single valid review and covered by post-review tests and validators.
P3-2 is an intentional CP00-101 to CP00-102 boundary because CP00-101 ends at RP01.P05.M09.S03 and CP00-102 starts at RP01.P05.M09.S04.
P3-4 is an unrelated untracked handoff note preserved by policy and not staged for CP00-101.
